# OpsFlow Advisory

> Supply chain advisory for companies across EMEA, based in Switzerland.
> Services: Planning Excellence, S&OP (Sales & Operations Planning),
> Inventory Optimisation, Supply Risk Management, Distribution Planning.
> MIT-certified consultants. 17+ years of experience across EMEA & LATAM.

## Pages

- [Home](https://www.opsflow-advisory.ch/): Advisory services overview, engagement model and pricing
- [OpsFlow Academy](https://www.opsflow-advisory.ch/academy): Process & Capability Sprint — process improvement + team training for Swiss SMEs (FR/EN/DE)
- [S&OP Health Check](https://www.opsflow-advisory.ch/diagnostic): Free 12-minute S&OP maturity assessment (32 questions, 8 dimensions)
- [Diagnostic Platform](https://www.opsflow-advisory.ch/platform): Data-driven supply chain diagnostics — inventory, demand & forecast, supply risk, planning KPIs

## Contact

- Email: caio@opsflow-advisory.ch
